notes: Lower bound is for a single dense n x n float64 matrix (e.g. Y). Actual peak usage during MC-EM is a multiple of this (Y, mu_y, eta_y, gradient/precision buffers per Newton step, L=5 MC samples kept simultaneously). Current implementation has no pair mask and no sparse representation, so all O(n^2) pair terms are computed densely every Newton iteration; full Cora was NOT executed in this script.
